name: Visit Video Logger
releaseNotes: Fixes overlay readability and map resilience. Removes the on-screen Gallery and status/Ready panels, lowers locality typography, joins the location and map backgrounds, scrolls longer fun facts vertically, adds an in-map compass, starts tile prefetch as soon as GPS location is available, improves speed-sensitive zoom, increases in-memory tile cache, stores OSM tiles on disk, retries failed tiles sooner, and draws cached parent tiles/placeholders so the map does not go black while exact tiles load.
